landing.quote: meta board rows clip hero names and pick tags at every viewport — 'Ikra…', 'Ram…', 'Auro…', 'Murdoc…', 'Zin…' and tag links cut to 'Sle', 'P', 'SI' (390 and 1024)
landing.issue: truncated names/tags make the top picks unreadable
landing.fix: let the name+tag block wrap to a second line (or place win% under the name) instead of a fixed-width right column that forces ellipsis

hero.quote: the red-outlined 'How to beat Countess' pill wraps to its own right-aligned row below the Game plan / Learn the hero tabs at 390/360px
hero.issue: reads as a detached competing CTA in a second accent color rather than a third tab
hero.fix: keep all three tabs in one left-aligned wrapping row with the neutral tab style; apply the red accent only when the counter tab is active

hero.quote: 'Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Spectral Schematics: their 3s all-in loses N% of its bite, at the cost of ~29% of this kit's damage' repeats near-verbatim in 5 of 6 matchup rows
hero.issue: same swap advice duplicated across the whole matchup list
hero.fix: state the Raiment-of-Renewal losing-lane swap once above the matchup list and keep only the per-enemy % delta inline in each row

hero.quote: matchup copy: 'their 3s all-in loses 11% of its bite, at the cost of 29% of this kit's damage' and 'you hold the kill-threat edge'
hero.issue: shorthand jargon ('3s all-in', 'bite', 'kill-threat edge') opaque to a new player
hero.fix: rephrase in plain terms, e.g. 'their full combo hits 11% weaker, but you give up 29% of your own damage' and 'you win the all-in fight'

coach.quote: fold summary paragraph: 'of six won fights we cashed two — the 11.1 win bought Fangtooth at 11.2 and the 15.7 win bought a tower at 15.9, while the 2.4, 8.3, 9.7 and 12.9 wins turned into nothing on the map — so towers read only 2-1 at the end'
coach.issue: one ~60-word sentence packed with six decimal timestamps plus 'cashed'/'leak' jargon, above the fold
coach.fix: split into two short sentences and compress the timestamp list ('four of the six wins turned into nothing on the map'), keeping exact times in the fight timeline below

coach.quote: 'Reading the map' key under the fight map is a fully expanded run-on paragraph defining ~10 symbols (blue band, green glow, towers, pits, flank buffs, rings, caught-out, numbered dots, dotted line)
coach.issue: dense always-on legend instead of on-demand disclosure
coach.fix: move the symbol key into a collapsed <details> ('Reading the map') or a compact two-column symbol list

coach.quote: 'gold ring = game-defining (heuristic, THEORY)' is defined in both the fight-timeline key and again in the fight-map 'Reading the map' key
coach.issue: same marker explained twice on one page
coach.fix: define the gold-ring/game-defining marker once in a single shared key for the timeline + map pair

coach.quote: draft & lane matchups header/legend: 'sim kill-window as a second opinion' and 'Per-minute kill-window (5·10·15·20·25·30), green = our window'
coach.issue: 'kill-window' jargon (explicitly on the rubric's jargon list) where the hero page already uses plain phrasing
coach.fix: reuse the plain wording from the hero page: 'green = the minutes you can win the fight'

squad.quote: primary green headline: 'OPTIMAL LINEUP · all 120 permutations scored · worth +2.8 wins/100 vs queue habits'
squad.issue: shorthand ('wins/100', 'permutations', 'queue habits') in the page's most important line; the plain version only appears in Coach Notes at the very bottom
squad.fix: write the headline plainly — 'best seating · worth about +2.8 wins per 100 games vs everyone playing their usual role' — and move 'all 120 permutations scored' into the Data scope collapse
